title: PrimeReplace Atlas: a transcript-unit architecture database for disease-associated large-fragment genome writing
description: PrimeReplace Atlas is a pre-implementation transcript-unit target-architecture database for the large-fragment genome-writing era. It maps disease-associated ClinVar pathogenic/likely pathogenic records onto MANE/GENCODE transcript units and reports record support, transcript-unit type, record-level coverage, payload/context burden, architecture class, and condition-associated record facets. The resource is restricted to record-level target architecture and does not select an editing modality, estimate patient-level prevalence, or model editing outcomes.

creators.name: Junjae Park
creators.affiliation: Department of Brain and Cognitive Sciences, KAIST
